publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-11 23:21:14 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Cash book (1860-1864); a ledger of monthly accounts (1861-1863); and a monthly transaction and account book (1854-1858), the latter covering the years surrounding the bank's incorporation in 1856 in Wayne County.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Brigg's Bank of Clyde, Incorporated in 1856 was a capital stock of about $70,000 with Samuel S. Briggs as President, William H. Coffin as a cashier and principal manager with stockholders including Messers Briggs, Coffin, Redfield, and Ketcham. In 1859 bad debts and losses amounted to nearly $50,000, and Mr. Briggs purchased the interests of others and became sole owner. On January 28, 1860 Aaron Griswold purchased a half-interest, which he retained until the death of Mr. Briggs in September 1865 at the time he sold out to Samuel H. Briggs, Who bought up the remaining interests and sold part to W.H. Palmer. In 1866 the bank*s circulation was called in, its securities in possession of the state redeemed, and it was changed into a private bank under the name of Briggs & Palmer.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of an incomplete series of one cash book (April 1860-64), one ledger of monthly accounts (February l86l-l863), and one volume of monthly transactions and accounts (October 1854-58).

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Brigg's Bank of Clyde accounts, #6037. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Banks and banking -- Accounting.
Banks and banking -- New York (State) -- Clyde.

did.unittitle: S.S. Briggs Cash Book, April 24, 1860 - October 1864 , lists date, name, transaction and amount for each entry. Unpaginated.
Ledger of monthly accounts, February 1861-1863 , lists accounts, mainly with other banks. 6l6 pp.
Banks monthly transactions and accounts October 16, 1854-1858 . 407 pp.
